items.summary: On the Register page Step 2 (Authenticate screen), replace the single 'Verify with Internet Identity' button with four distinct authentication option buttons matching the Internet Identity (id.ai) UI: a Google button (with Google 'G' logo), an Apple button (with Apple logo), a Microsoft button (with Microsoft colored squares logo), and a 'Continue with Passkey' button (with passkey/person icon). Each button, when clicked, must trigger the Internet Identity login flow — the underlying authentication mechanism remains Internet Identity, but the UI presents these four options directly on the screen so users can visually select their preferred method before the popup opens.

On the Login page, replace the existing single Internet Identity authentication button with the same four authentication option buttons: Google (with Google 'G' logo), Apple (with Apple logo), Microsoft (with Microsoft colored squares logo), and 'Continue with Passkey' (with passkey/person icon). Each button triggers the Internet Identity login flow. The underlying authentication mechanism remains Internet Identity.
